network_summary: Elmhurst Dental Group, Ltd. is a multi-location dental group founded in 1974 by four Elmhurst dentists. It now operates 9 locations across Illinois and Wisconsin under the 'Partners in Care' management umbrella (est. 1990), with Colleen Yaccino serving as a non-dentist Managing Partner and CEO. Dr. Lawrence P. Groh (DDS) is listed as Owner/President and a co-owner of Partners in Care, practicing primarily at the Elmhurst and St. Charles offices. The group uses distinct consumer-facing trade names per location (Addison Dental, St. Charles Dental, etc.) under the Elmhurst Dental Group, Ltd. legal entity. No PE backer identified — clinician co-owned with a lay CEO management layer. Classified as branded_dso: centralized management entity (Partners in Care), non-dentist CEO, multi-location platform with distinct branded sub-practices, consistent with a dentist-founded DSO structure.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Lawrence P. Groh, DDS — Owner/President, Elmhurst Dental Group, Ltd.; co-owner of Partners in Care management entity. Founded alongside Dr. Smith (also owner/partner). Non-dentist CEO Colleen Yaccino serves as Managing Partner.
durable_artifacts: Shared EIN 362736573 across Addison (60101) and Elmhurst (60126) locations
Same legal name 'ELMHURST DENTAL GROUP, LTD' across all 4 watched IL NPI records
NPPES authorized official LAWRENCE GROH on all 4 NPI records (reach=4, ZIPs 60101/60126/60175/60506)
Non-dentist Managing Partner/CEO (Colleen Yaccino) in centralized 'Partners in Care' management entity since 1990
9-location multi-state group (IL + WI) with distinct branded sub-practice trade names
mso_platform_pe_evidence: Partners in Care (est. 1990) functions as the management entity of Elmhurst Dental Group, Ltd., with a non-dentist CEO/Managing Partner (Colleen Yaccino). This constitutes a centralized management layer above the clinical practices. No PE backer identified. Source: https://elmhurstdental.com/partners-in-care/
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: All 4 watched IL locations appear to be active operating offices confirmed on the group's public website and NPI records. The Addison location (1201 W Army Trail Blvd) is listed as 'Addison Dental' on the group's locator. Aurora location (345 Sullivan Rd) confirmed as an active member of the Elmhurst Dental network.
evidence_chain: AO signal: LAWRENCE GROH appears as authorized official on 4 distinct IL NPI records (ZIPs 60101, 60126, 60175, 60506), all registered under 'ELMHURST DENTAL GROUP, LTD' with shared EIN 362736573. Documentary corroboration: (1) elmhurstdental.com/partners-in-care/ confirms Dr. Groh as co-owner of 'Partners in Care' management entity, Owner/President role, practicing at Elmhurst and St. Charles offices; (2) group website (elmhurstdental.com) shows 9-location platform across IL and WI with branded sub-practice names; (3) RocketReach and e-physician.info confirm Dr. Groh as Owner/President at the Aurora NPI address; (4) Shared EIN across at least 2 watched ZIPs. No PE backing found; structure is dentist co-owned with a non-dentist CEO management layer.
future_app_notes: Verify whether the Aurora (60506) location at 345 Sullivan Rd is still active — it does not appear in the 9-location list on the website (which lists Addison, Bartlett, Beloit, Bloomingdale, Elmhurst, Lake Geneva, Milton, St. Charles, West Dundee). Could be a closed or renamed office. The Addison location (60101) is listed as 'Addison Dental' on the group site. Confirm 'Partners in Care' is not registered as a formal MSO/LLC separately from Elmhurst Dental Group, Ltd. (check IL SOS). Yaccino's exact title and whether she holds equity should be verified for precise DSO-vs-dentist-multi classification.
